data.body: Third remediation: restored the epic-approved existing optional index-keyed Pass-2 field and yes|no|na vocabulary; defined general and focused verification as separate non-overlapping index domains; each domain is reshaped and decided independently, then their decided lists are concatenated before the single existing partition call. Added named focused prompts, explicit coverage wrapper registration, Python-level focused-route completeness validation, and complete workflow/schema file impact. Retain prerequisite-indeterminate precedence over BLOCK because the certified epic explicitly requires any indeterminate prerequisite record to force whole-review unsigned INDETERMINATE.
